name: Sine Wave Bands
description: Layered sine-wave bands with an IQ cosine palette — an original reimplementation inspired by Shadertoy tffSDr.

name: Saturday Weirdness
description: A faithful lite-gl port of mrange's CC0 Shadertoy (43jXWt): a raymarched rotating sphere with frame-feedback through a ping-pong render target, FXAA-resolved to screen. Showcases the lite-gl render-target (FBO) API.

name: Inside the Mandelbulb
description: A faithful lite-gl port of mrange's CC0 Shadertoy (mtScRc): a refraction-bouncing raymarched power-8 mandelbulb rendered into an offscreen render target, then FXAA-resolved to screen. Showcases the lite-gl single render-target (FBO) path.

name: Just Another Cube
description: A faithful lite-gl port of mrange's CC0 Shadertoy (3XdXRr): a single fullscreen-pass raymarched, twisting superquadric ('rounded cube') with volumetric glow, fresnel reflections of a procedural sky/floor and rim lighting. Showcases the lite-gl single-pass fullscreen-effect path (no render target).
